name: Moist Chocolate Brownies
recipeInstructions: Preheat oven to 350 degrees. Spray a 13x9 inches baking pan with cooking spray. In a large saucepan, over low heat, combine milk, cocoa and chocolate morsels. Stir until the morsels are melted; remove from heat. Stir in egg whites, flour, baking powder and vanilla, mixing well. Turn into prepared pan. Bake 20 minutes, or until center is set. Cool completely on a wire rack. To serve, cut into squares. Sprinkle with confectioner's sugar if desired.
